# twc_router (Resource)

Resource for describing virtual router


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Router name
- `networks` (Block List, Min: 1) Param that indicates which local-networks router will manage (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--networks))
- `preset_id` (Number) Preset ID for router

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Comment for creating router
- `ips` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--ips))
- `parent_services` (Block List, Max: 1) Param that indicated with which resource router will be used (for example: K8S worker-nodes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--parent_services))
- `project_id` (Number) Id that allow you to attach router to project
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `availability_zone` (String) Availability zone where router located
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) Router status

<a id="nestedblock--networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `networks`

Required:

- `network_name` (String) Name of the network managed by router (exactly you should place here pvc's id)

Optional:

- `is_dhcp_enabled` (Boolean) Params that indicated will router use DHCP for this network


<a id="nestedblock--ips"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ips`

Optional:

- `ip` (String) Param that indicates which ipv4 will be used for nat if 'nat' option presented. If you need to create one, you should create floating ip and assign it here
- `nat` (Block List, Max: 1) Param that indicates for which local-network ipv4 will be used (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--ips--nat))

<a id="nestedblock--ips--nat"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ips.nat`

Required:

- `network_name` (String) Name (id) of the network which you should provide for router nat ipv4 to be bound with local-network



<a id="nestedblock--parent_services"></a>
### Nested Schema for `parent_services`

Required:

- `id` (Number) Id of parent service (for example - K8S cluster)
- `type` (String)


<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)
